calendar.matters:
Petition To Terminate Irrevocable Trust For Changed Circumstances
Off Calendar Jan-06-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Martin Kopp (via court call) for (successor trustee) Morgan Stanley Private Bank.

The Court asked why this petition was not filed in Santa Clara County. Mr. Kopp stated that the only connection to Santa Clara is his law firm, that they only represent this client for this petition, not for the administration of the trust, that the beneficiary resides in San Francisco, that the trust is being terminated at the beneficiaries request as she no longer needs the income, that San Francisco is the only location associated with the trust, that Morgan Stanley had an office in San Francisco, that they are qualified to administer the trust in San Francisco but that the office is now closed. The petition to terminate irrevocable trust for changed circumstances was taken under submission.

Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy C. Robles. (Not Reported)
